caption: The video displays a presentation slide titled "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" and "Tutorial – 2". The slide features a section on "Figure of Merit (FOM)" accompanied by a thermodynamic diagram with a plotted cycle showing paths labeled "T=const", "p=const", "D=const", and "h=const". Numerical values are provided in boxes: "W/m_f = 6265.22" and "W/m_f = 767". At the bottom, the text "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay" is visible alongside a small logo. As the video progresses, an equation for "FOM = W/m_f" is written on the blue background. In the final stages, the formula is expanded to show the calculation "FOM = W/m_f = 767 / 6265.22 = 0.1225", with a white line striking through the initial "W/m_f" term to show the substitution of the specific values.
